heading: Organization defined
label: 18 Organization defined
text: As used in this title, the term “organization” means a person other than an individual.
notes: Amendments1988— made technical correction of directory language of , similar to that made by .Pub. L. 100–690Pub. L. 99–646, § 38(a)Pub. L. 100–1851987— made technical correction in directory language of .Pub. L. 100–185Pub. L. 99–646, § 38(a)
